products.name: D1500
products.descriptor: High-redundancy 2×3 phase direct-drive axial flux electric motor

evidence.snippet: > “It’s great to see our D1500 motors, powering Cranfield’s hydrogen electric aircraft. The Fresson project is the 1st application showcasing our high redundancy 2×3 phase direct drive electric motor, providing industry leading torque & efficiency to the aircraft.

products.name: Axial Flux Motors
products.descriptor: Lightweight high-torque axial flux electric motor family for aircraft propulsion

evidence.snippet:
### Axial flux motors
##### Our motors are the smallest and lightest in their performance class, yielding high torque and power density.
[Find out about our motors](https://evolito.aero/axial-flux-motors/)

products.name: Motor Controller Units (MCUs)
products.descriptor: Motor controllers designed for seamless integration with Evolito axial flux motors

evidence.snippet: ##### Evolito’s motor controls (MCUs), have been designed for seamless integration with our axial flux electric motors.

products.name: Battery Systems & Management
products.descriptor: Expandable Energy Storage System with battery management for electric aircraft

evidence.snippet: ##### Evolito’s battery solutions have been designed to allow for rapid development of an Expandable Energy Storage System.

unresolved_questions: The dedicated product pages for Axial Flux Motors (https://evolito.aero/axial-flux-motors) and Motor Controller Units (https://evolito.aero/motor-controller-units) were skipped (skipped_class_budget), so motor family specs, additional SKUs beyond D1500, and MCU model variants are unknown.
The battery-solutions page (https://evolito.aero/battery-solutions) failed during crawl; Battery Systems & Management readiness and any named battery product SKUs could not be determined.
The D1500 is confirmed as an active SKU but no power rating or weight spec was captured from the corpus — these would be on the skipped axial-flux-motors page.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated product page for Axial Flux Motors family; would reveal motor model variants beyond D1500, power ratings, and any NDAA/compliance claims.
Dedicated product page for MCU family; would reveal model variants, specs, and any compliance claims.
Battery solutions product page failed during crawl; needed to classify battery SKUs and readiness.
